steps.title: Find what proves the claim
steps.content: To prove 2019 had the most medicine and health submissions, we need data showing 2019's medicine and health value is the highest in the period.

steps.title: Match to the data
steps.content: Choice D identifies the highest medicine and health submission as approximately 285 in 2019, confirming the claim. The other three either discuss unrelated topics or misrepresent the data. That matches choice D — D is correct.
